---
name: Security finding
about: Report a security issue in the spec, SDKs, or demo flows
title: "[Security]"
labels: security
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the security concern.

## Affected area

- spec
- JS SDK
- Python SDK
- .NET SDK
- demo

## Reproduction

Give safe reproduction steps or a minimal example.

## Expected impact

What could go wrong if this is not fixed?

## Disclosure preference

Private disclosure preferred.
